instruction: Your insurance has changed to a new plan. Complete the transition by: 1) Updating your insurance plan details to plan name "Aetna PPO Silver", member ID "AET-5529103", and group number "GRP-88914", 2) Setting the mail-order pharmacy already in your pharmacy list as the default pharmacy for the new plan. Do not send any messages, do not cancel appointments, and do not discontinue any medications.
